meta.title: Stable Diffusion 提示词模板库
meta.description: 适用于 Stable Diffusion (WebUI/ComfyUI) 的提示词模板，含正向与负面提示词
meta.usage: 将 positive 和 negative 字段分别粘贴到对应输入框，根据需要替换 [方括号] 中的占位符并调整参数

templates.name: 写实人像
templates.description: 高质量写实人像，适用于 SDXL 或 SD 1.5 写实模型
templates.positive: (masterpiece, best quality, ultra-detailed:1.2), RAW photo of [人物描述, e.g., a young woman with freckles], (photorealistic:1.4), [光照, e.g., soft natural window light], [镜头, e.g., 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field], (film grain:0.3), [色调, e.g., warm golden tones], looking at viewer
templates.negative: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), (ugly, deformed:1.3), extra fingers, mutated hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, bad proportions, watermark, text, signature, blurry, out of focus, oversaturated

templates.name: 风景摄影
templates.positive: (masterpiece, best quality:1.2), breathtaking [场景, e.g., mountain lake at dawn], (photorealistic:1.3), [天气, e.g., misty morning with golden light], ultra-detailed, 8K, National Geographic quality, [镜头, e.g., wide angle 16mm], vivid colors, sharp focus
templates.negative: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), blurry, oversaturated, cartoon, anime, painting, illustration, watermark, text, ugly sky

templates.name: 动漫角色
templates.positive: (masterpiece, best quality, extremely detailed:1.2), 1girl/1boy, [角色描述, e.g., silver hair, blue eyes, wearing a white dress], [场景, e.g., standing in a field of flowers], [光效, e.g., magical particles, soft backlighting], beautiful detailed face, detailed eyes, [风格, e.g., anime key visual, Makoto Shinkai style]
templates.negative: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), (bad anatomy:1.3), extra fingers, fewer fingers, bad hands, missing arms, extra legs, fused fingers, poorly drawn face, mutation, deformed, ugly, blurry, watermark, text

templates.name: 动漫场景
templates.positive: (masterpiece, best quality:1.2), no humans, [场景, e.g., a magical floating library with endless bookshelves], [氛围, e.g., ethereal blue and purple lighting, dust particles in sunbeams], (extremely detailed background:1.3), [风格, e.g., Studio Ghibli, watercolor texture], wide shot, cinematic composition
templates.negative: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), blurry, text, watermark, signature, simple background, flat colors, ugly

templates.name: 角色概念设计
templates.positive: (masterpiece, best quality:1.2), character concept art, [角色, e.g., a steampunk engineer with mechanical arm], full body, character sheet, multiple views, front and side view, [风格, e.g., detailed armor design, intricate gears and pipes], white background, professional concept art, (Artstation:1.1)
templates.negative: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), bad anatomy, extra limbs, blurry, watermark, text, cropped, partial body, messy background

templates.name: 姿态控制生成
templates.description: 使用 OpenPose 控制角色姿态
templates.positive: (masterpiece, best quality:1.2), [角色描述, e.g., a female warrior in battle stance], [风格, e.g., fantasy art, dramatic lighting], dynamic pose, detailed armor, flowing cape, (extremely detailed:1.1)
templates.negative: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, blurry, watermark
templates.notes: 需要先准备 OpenPose 骨骼图作为控制输入

templates.name: 深度图控制
templates.description: 使用深度图控制场景空间层次
templates.positive: (masterpiece, best quality:1.2), [场景, e.g., a grand cathedral interior with towering arches], [光效, e.g., stained glass window light casting colorful patterns], (ultra-detailed architecture:1.3), atmospheric perspective, volumetric lighting
templates.negative: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), blurry, flat, no depth, watermark, text

negative_prompt_presets.description: 常用负面提示词预设，可直接复制使用

presets.name: 通用负面提示词
presets.negative: (worst quality, low quality, normal quality:1.4), ugly, deformed, noisy, blurry, watermark, text, signature, username, artist name

presets.name: 写实摄影专用
presets.negative: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), (ugly, deformed:1.3), extra fingers, mutated hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, bad proportions, watermark, text, signature, blurry, out of focus, oversaturated, cartoon, anime, painting, illustration, 3d render, CGI

presets.name: 动漫插画专用
presets.negative: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), (bad anatomy:1.3), extra fingers, fewer fingers, bad hands, missing arms, extra legs, fused fingers, poorly drawn face, mutation, deformed, ugly, blurry, watermark, text, realistic, photo, 3d

presets.name: 概念艺术专用
presets.negative: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), bad anatomy, extra limbs, blurry, watermark, text, cropped, partial body, messy, amateur, sketch, unfinished
